name: app-gtm-release
description: Multi-platform app go-to-market and release toolkit — ship Flutter, Kotlin Multiplatform, .NET MAUI, Swift, and PWAs to Google Play, App Store, Microsoft Store, Snap Store, Flathub, and alternative channels. Three-tier command architecture: ship-advisor (strategy), per-framework ship-X commands (execution), ship-everywhere (mass publish). v2.3 adds the gtm-fit skill — GTM strategy layer (SLIP framework, minimum viable segment, organic presence system) so shipped apps also sell.
